items.notes: Versions refer to Cisco Nexus NX-OS. Latest is 12.3(2); recommended stable is 12.2(5). EOL list includes prior major releases; always verify against official Cisco NPP and CCO for current status and advisories.

Versions are for common universal IOS-XE train used on enterprise hardware (e.g., ASR1000/ISR4000). 17.12.x is the current train; 17.12.3 is the latest release. 17.12.1 is recommended for stability and broad hardware support. 16.12.x releases are EOL; refer to Cisco's official documentation for model-specific availability and EOL dates.

Versions are for the 9800-WLC running the standard 9800 image family. Confirm compatibility with your specific deployment and controller model. Refer to the official Cisco End-of-Life and Software Maintenance Policy pages for the most current status and any updates.

Version numbers follow the major.minor.patch scheme; patch releases within a minor line provide fixes. Check the official Palo Alto Networks Lifecycle Policy for precise EOL dates and any intervening advisories.
